questions.question: What day of the week was January 1, 2000?
How many odd days are in 100 years?
questions.explanation: 100 years = 76 normal + 24 leap = 76×1+24×2=124 odd days = 17 weeks + 5 days = 5 odd days.

questions.question: If February 1, 2010 is Monday, what day is March 1, 2010?
questions.explanation: February 2010 has 28 days (non-leap). 28 = 4 weeks exactly. March 1 is same day = Monday.

questions.question: A leap year has how many odd days?
questions.explanation: Leap year = 366 days = 52 weeks + 2 days = 2 odd days.

questions.question: On what day does 1st March 2024 fall if 1st January 2024 is Monday?
questions.explanation: Jan: 31 days(31-1=30 from Jan1), Feb: 29(leap). Total=30+29=59 days=8 weeks+3 days. Monday+3=Thursday. 1 March= Friday.

questions.question: How many days are there from 4th February to 30th April (both dates inclusive)?
The first day of a non-leap year is Tuesday. What is the last day?
questions.explanation: 365 days = 52 weeks + 1 day. Last day = Tuesday + 1 = Wednesday.
